_doc: Worldgen tuning consumed by elevation_map.gd, anchor_planner.gd,
All values are data-only: tweak here, no generator code changes needed.
elevation.bounds: upper height-field bound for levels 0..6 (level 7 is
everything above the last bound). Levels: 0 deep water, 1 shallow water,
2 lowland, 3 normal land, 4 hill, 5 high hill, 6 mountain, 7 peak.
ruggedFreq/ruggedAmp: jitter added to height before banding (gameplay
levels only — rendering uses the smooth field).
slopeShade: rolling-hill shading strength — NW-lit smooth gradient, no
contour lines. slopeShadeMax clamps it. highlandTint: gradual ground
lightening above lowland height, suggesting thin rocky soil.
water.riverWidthBase/Extra: river half-width in noise space (extra widens
toward lowlands). lakeFreq: lake noise frequency (lower = bigger blobs).
lakeWater/lakeShore: noise thresholds — lower = larger lakes.
resources.elevationDensity: per-skill multiplier indexed by elevation
level 0..7. 0 disables the skill at that level; >1 boosts it.
roads.halfWidth: rendered path half-width in tiles (gradient edge);
the walkable painted core is narrower. wobble makes paths meander.
connectHubs: how many nearest anchors get a road from home.
